theme.description: Premium, clean, and professional dashboard heavily inspired by Samsara, Stripe, and Uber Fleet. Prioritizes data visibility, clear visual hierarchy, and functional beauty.

rules.headings: MUST use tracking-tight (e.g., tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) for text-2xl and above to create a premium, compact feel.
rules.body: Use leading-relaxed for body paragraphs, but leading-snug for data tables and list items.
rules.overline: Labels and small KPIs MUST be uppercase, text-xs, font-semibold, and tracking-wider (tracking-[0.05em] or tracking-[0.1em]).
rules.anti_pattern: Do NOT use default Inter for massive display headings. Differentiate hierarchy with font weight (e.g., font-medium vs font-semibold).

colors.rules: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Use the Slate color palette for neutral grays. Backgrounds should feel expansive.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-6 to p-8) inside major containers to let data breathe.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-xl (12px) for main cards, rounded-lg for buttons and inner elements, rounded-2xl for main app layout shells.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: Soft, diffuse ambient shadows. Use shadow-sm for default cards, shadow-md for hover states, and shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] for floating elements.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: MODE B: High Density Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 for precise widget alignment.
spacing_and_layout.responsive: Mobile-first. Stacking columns on mobile, structured bento grid on desktop.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky headers or bottom nav (mobile): bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b or border-t border-slate-200.
visual_enhancers.neumorphism: Not recommended for this style. Stick to flat surfaces with 1px borders and soft shadows (Stripe/Samsara aesthetic).
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive cards and buttons MUST have hover states (e.g., hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out).

sidebar.desktop: Collapsible vertical sidebar on the left. bg-white border-r border-slate-200. Active state: bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 font-medium rounded-lg. Icons: lucide-react.
sidebar.mobile: Bottom fixed navigation bar. bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-slate-200 pb-safe.

kpi_cards.layout: Top row of dashboard. grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6.
kpi_cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer transition-all. Clickable for auto-filtering.
kpi_cards.content: Overline label, large bold number (text-3xl tracking-tight), and a visual trend indicator or status icon.

mini_map.style: bg-slate-100 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden relative.
mini_map.content: Interactive map container. Use placeholder image if map component not ready, but design overlay controls (zoom, layers) to look native.

alerts_feed.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-0 shadow-sm flex flex-col.
alerts_feed.content: Header with 'Alertes en temps réel' and badge count. Scrollable list (overflow-y-auto). Each item needs an icon (lucide), title, time (text-xs text-slate-400), and soft bottom border.

activity_timeline.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-6 shadow-sm.
activity_timeline.content: Vertical timeline. Use a left border with absolute positioned dots to represent recent asset movements or status changes.

accessibility.contrast: Text must meet APCA or WCAG AA standards. No light gray text on white backgrounds (min text-slate-500).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-nav-dashboard', data-testid='kpi-card-actifs').
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-1 on all buttons and inputs.

media_and_icons.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 2 or 1.5 depending on size. Keep sizes consistent (w-5 h-5 for sidebar).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Retain the existing React (CRA) architecture. Do not attempt to migrate to Next.js or change build tools (Craco/Tailwind are already configured).
CRITICAL: Maintain the external API connection to 'omniyat.is-certified.com' via proxy. Do not break existing login/auth flows.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for custom layouts (like the bento grid dashboard) to ensure perfect control over spacing and responsiveness.
For components like Select, Dialog, or DropdownMenu, use the existing Shadcn UI primitives at /app/frontend/src/components/ui/. Customize them to fit the 12px border-radius and Slate color palette.
Ensure the sidebar is fully responsive: it should be a vertical collapsible sidebar on desktop, and cleanly convert to a fixed bottom navigation bar on mobile (hidden on desktop).
Do not use generic generic 'card' components if they restrict layout. Build flexible cards using raw div and tailwind classes.
Do not apply global transitions like 'transition: all' as it breaks transform-based animations.
For KPI cards, implement onClick handlers that will eventually connect to list filtering.
Ensure dark mode is planned by using semantic Tailwind color variables if possible, or mapping strictly to Tailwind's slate/blue palette so it can be easily inverted later.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and soft shadows.
Do not center-align the app container. Preserve normal document flow.
Use modern pill-shaped or softly rounded (12px) buttons with precise interaction animations.
NEVER use emojis for icons. Always use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
